problem_description: Ineffective Fix / Out-of-Bounds Read: The patch fails to prevent reading past the mapped memory region because the size is rounded back up to a 16-byte boundary.
Data race between concurrent `rk_iommu_attach_device()` and `rk_iommu_zap_iova()` due to early list addition
Missing memory barrier in lockless readers leads to stale data reads when elements are reused.
NULL pointer dereference due to `session_fd_check` clearing `fp->tcon` concurrently
The newly added error path fails to restore `vdev->minor = -1` before returning, which violates the API contract and causes memory leaks in caller drivers.
Error Path Resource Leak / Filesystem Corruption
Pre-existing off-by-one error in trailing match loop causes silent data corruption.
Integer overflow in `lz77_compressed_alloc_size` leading to heap buffer overflow
Pre-existing logic error in bitmask validation allows clients to bypass parameter checks.
`sso_led_freq_set()` incorrectly shifts values and overlaps bitmasks, corrupting adjacent register fields. This problem wasn't introduced by this patch, but it is a severe pre-existing bug.
